tests.name: test_search_exact_match
tests.description: Search for 'production' finds exactly 1 matching message with snippet highlighting

tests.name: test_search_prefix_match
tests.description: Search for 'devel*' prefix matches 'development' via FTS5 prefix query

tests.name: test_search_across_channels
tests.description: Search across all channels finds matching messages in multiple channels

tests.name: test_search_channel_filter
tests.description: channel_id parameter narrows search to a single channel

tests.name: test_search_deleted_messages_excluded
tests.description: Messages with deleted_at IS NOT NULL are excluded from results

tests.name: test_search_non_member_excluded
tests.description: Users cannot search messages in channels they do not belong to

tests.name: test_search_limit
tests.description: Limit parameter controls number of results returned

summary: All 10 search tests pass. FTS5 BM25 ranking, snippet with <mark> highlighting, permission filtering via channel_members, deleted_at exclusion, and channel-specific filtering all verified.
query_used: SELECT m.*, snippet(messages_fts, 0, '<mark>', '</mark>', '...', 32) AS snippet FROM messages m JOIN messages_fts fts ON m.rowid = fts.rowid WHERE messages_fts MATCH ? AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.channel_id IN (SELECT channel_id FROM channel_members WHERE user_id = ?) ORDER BY bm25(messages_fts) LIMIT ?
